title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: No edits made. Minimal root-cause hypothesis for today’s 429s: **the active Manus account/key can authenticate, but new task creation is blocked by account credit cap (not HTTP rate-limit, not profile-specific).** Evidence: - Client only does task create/poll; there is no account/quota preflight endpoint call, so failures are discovered only at `POST /tasks`. [manus-api-client.js#L64](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L64) [manus-api-client.js#L135](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L135) - Key resolution is ambiguous when both vars exist (`MANUS_API_KEY` wins over `MANUS_MCP_API_KEY`), so wrong-account selection is possible as a secondary factor. [manus-api-client.js#L55](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L55) - Same 429 `"credit limit exceeded"` appears in live probes with profile, without profile, and `api-ai` variant. [with-profile.body.json#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/with-profile.body.json#L1) [no-profile.body.json#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/no-profile.body.json#L1) [api-ai.body.json#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/api-ai.body.json#L1) - Response headers show `x-ratelimit-remaining: 199` even on 429, so this is not classic request-rate exhaustion. [with-profile.headers.txt#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/with-profile.headers.txt#L1) - The same key/session can still read a prior task (`HTTP 200`) and that prior task reports nonzero credit usage, which fits “account valid, creation credits exhausted now.” [prior-task.headers.txt#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/prior-task.headers.txt#L1) [prior-task.body.json#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/prior-task.body.json#L1) - Pipeline failure observed in deck run as `Network error: API 429: credit limit exceeded` and classified as `manus-provider-quota`. [inspection-report.json#L8](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-recheck/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json#L8) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L120](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L120) Risk/missing-test note: - Current code wraps API errors as generic `Network error`, reducing diagnosis precision. [manus-api-client.js#L77](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L77) [manus-api-client.js#L101](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L101) - Unit coverage exists for regex classification, but not for key-selection/account-mismatch preflight behavior. [test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L83](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L83)
